creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Compiles fine in 8.2. 
Packages build fine in 8.2, and 7.4 (i386), not tested in amd64 
There is a policy for not backporting or trying to fix EOL like 8.0-release 
Clean your portstree, and upgrade to a supported version of the os. 
If you can replicate on a supported version, open a new bug. 
NOTE: as these three had 3 different maintainers, you had best open one 
bug for each package, Do include logs.
